# **Global Powerplant Insight** - World Renewable Energy Transition: A personal project from ***Yonathan Hary Hutagalung***

## Dataset Information: World Research Insititute. 2025. Global Power Plant Database. Retrived from: [WRI Website](https://datasets.wri.org/datasets/global-power-plant-database?%3D%3D)

## **Project Scope:** Create a tidy *jupyter notebook* showcasing how the renewable energy progress in the world in 2021 (Dataset collection) and generate a Dashboard using *Tableau* for further insights

## Jupyter Notebook Content and Features:
- Data Cleaning process
- Minimal libraries used: Plotly and Pandas only
- Interactive Explanatory Data Analysis using Plotly
- Interactive Map using Plotly

  
## Conclusion
- Coal and gas still dominates the electricity production globaly
- Solar energy dominates the numbers mainly because its modularity characteristics
- China and the US have highest electricity generation but European countries have the highest percentage of renewable used
- In 2021, our worlds  still dominated by conventional generation with percentage of 71% compared to renewables 29%
